# Westek Electric Corp.

> Licensed electrical contractor serving Lake Elsinore, Temecula, Murrieta, and Southern California since 2010. Residential and commercial electrical services, EV charger installation, panel upgrades, and 24/7 emergency service. CA License #C10-1100272.

## Business Info

- Name: Westek Electric Corp.
- Owner: Ryan Reese (18+ years experience)
- Phone: (909) 996-6678
- Email: westekelectriccompany@gmail.com
- Address: 29304 Abelia Ln., Lake Elsinore, CA 92530
- License: CA C10-1100272
- Founded: 2010
- Website: https://www.westekelectriccorp.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM, 24/7 Emergency Service Available
- Projects Completed: 5,000+
- Reviews: 127+ five-star reviews, 4.9 average rating

## Services

### Residential Electrical
Full-service home electrical solutions including panel upgrades, whole-house rewiring, ceiling fan installation, indoor and outdoor lighting, landscape lighting, pool and spa wiring, dedicated circuits, code corrections, appliance wiring, and new construction wiring.

- [Breaker Replacement](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/breaker-replacement)
- [Whole-House Rewiring](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/rewiring)
- [Ceiling Fan Installation](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/ceiling-fan)
- [Outdoor Lighting](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/outdoor-lighting)
- [Indoor Lighting](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/indoor-lighting)
- [Landscape Lighting](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/landscape-lighting)
- [Pool & Spa Lighting](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/pool-spa-lighting)
- [Hot Tub, Spa & Jacuzzi Wiring](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/hot-tub-spa-pool-jacuzzi)
- [Dedicated Circuits](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/dedicated-circuits)
- [Code Corrections](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/code-corrections)
- [Appliance Wiring](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/appliance-wiring)
- [New Construction Wiring](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/residential/new-construction)

### Commercial Electrical
Professional commercial electrical services for businesses of all sizes, including three-phase power, panel installation, security lighting, office lighting, transformers, low voltage wiring, Cat 6 network cabling, and new construction.

- [1 Phase & 3 Phase Circuits](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/1-phase-3-phase)
- [Breakers & Fuses](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/breakers-fuses)
- [Code Corrections](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/code-corrections)
- [Electrical Panel Installation](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/panel-installation)
- [New Construction Wiring](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/new-construction)
- [Exterior Lighting](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/outdoor-lighting)
- [Interior Lighting](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/indoor-lighting)
- [Security Lighting](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/security-lighting)
- [Transformers](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/transformers)
- [Office Lighting](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/office-lighting)
- [Low Voltage Wiring](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/low-voltage-wiring)
- [Cat 6 Network Cabling](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/commercial/cat6-installation)

### Specialty Services
- [LED Lighting Installation & Upgrades](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/led-lighting): Energy-efficient LED conversions for homes and businesses, saving up to 75% on lighting costs.
- [Switch & Outlet Installation](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/services/switches-outlets): GFCI, AFCI, USB outlets, smart switches, and dimmer installation and repair.
- [EV Charger Installation](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/ev-chargers): Level 2 home charging for Tesla, Ford, Chevrolet, and Rivian. Permits and inspections included. Typical cost $500-$2,500.

## Service Areas

Westek Electric serves Riverside County and San Diego County in Southern California:

- [Temecula](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/temecula) (92590, 92591, 92592)
- [Murrieta](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/murrieta) (92562, 92563)
- [Menifee](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/menifee) (92584, 92585, 92586, 92587)
- [Lake Elsinore](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/lake-elsinore) (92530, 92532) — Headquarters
- [Wildomar](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/wildomar) (92595)
- [Winchester](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/winchester) (92596)
- [French Valley](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/french-valley) (92596)
- [Fallbrook](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/fallbrook) (92028)
- [Hemet](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/hemet) (92543, 92544, 92545, 92546)
- [San Jacinto](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/san-jacinto) (92582, 92583)
- [Corona](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/corona) (92879, 92880, 92881, 92882, 92883)
- [Riverside](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/service-areas/riverside) (92501, 92503, 92504, 92505, 92506, 92507, 92508)

## Portfolio

Completed project case studies with photo galleries:

- [RC Car Track Electrical Installation](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/portfolio/rc-car-track): Underground conduit, power distribution, and outdoor lighting for a professional RC track.
- [Mobile Bakery Trailer](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/portfolio/mobile-bakery-trailer): Custom electrical panel, commercial kitchen circuits, and HVAC power for a mobile bakery.
- [Mobile Home Service Panel Replacement](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/portfolio/mobile-home-panel): 200-amp panel upgrade with code corrections and safety inspection.
- [DCH Dodge of Temecula](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/portfolio/dch-dodge-temecula): Showroom lighting, service bay power, and parking lot lighting for a Dodge dealership.
- [Hyundai of Anaheim](https://www.westekelectriccorp.com/portfolio/hyundai-anaheim): EV charger installation, showroom lighting, and service department electrical systems.
